details.text: Organizational conflict between innovation team and R&D execution team is a structural design issue, not accidental
Solution: Implement an 'ambidextrous organization' model with two separate teams controlled by unified senior leadership
R&D team focuses on executing and optimizing today's busines
Innovation team focuses on exploring and building tomorrow's bus
Both teams operate independently but are aligned through senior leadership oversight
Organizations using ambidextrous model achieve 90% success rate on innovation goa
Implementation requires three core components: structure, team assembly, and rules of engagemen
Getting the organizational structure right is the single most critical decision
Head of innovation must report directly to the CEO to establish innovation as a peer to R&D
Direct reporting line to CEO prevents territorial conflicts and eliminates innovation being positioned as subordinate to
Reporting structure is the single most critical decision - getting it wrong undermines the entire organizational m
Industry trend: 83% of physician informatics officers now have expanding roles, supporting the need for elevated innovation leadership
Innovation department should be structured with three main functional arms
First arm: Clinical and Insights team - acts as sensors/eyes and ears to understand clinician and patient pain points
Second arm: AI and Data team - technical engine that designs and builds models
Third arm: Projects and Implementation team - operational hub managing roadmaps, budgets, and executio
Innovation team structured as lean five-person team: innovation lead, senior AI/ML engineer, platform engineer, clinical informatics specialist, and one additional ro
Product manager role: keeps roadmap on track and manages metrics
Governance framework is critical to manage interface between innovation team and R&D department
Governance goal: prevent conflict, not create bureaucracy
Innovation steering committee serves as high-level control tower with CEO, head of R&D, innovation lead, and key clinical leaders
Steering committee's critical function: act as ultimate referee to decide which projects belong to innovation vs. R&D
Portfolio framework called 'three horizons' is a powerful tool to prevent conflict between t
Steering committee sets priorities and allocates resources across innovation and R&D initiatives
Three horizons framework provides clear swimlanes and shared language for project categorization
Horizon 1 (Core Business): incremental improvements to existing products/services, 0-2 year timeline, owned by R&D team
Horizon 2 (Adjacent Space): expansion into adjacent markets and capabilities
Horizon 2 (Adjacent Space): expansion into adjacent markets and capabilities, 2-4 year timeline, shared territory requiring collaboration between innovation and R&D teams
Steering committee plays a critical role in managing Horizon 2 projects and coordinating between teams
Horizon 3 (Breakthrough/Disruptive): unproven AI, totally new business models, 3-7 year timeline, owned by innovation team
Horizon 3 is the innovation team's sandbox with clear ownership and autonomy to explore breakthrough opportunities
Practical workflow begins with insights team collecting real problems from clinicians on the
Product manager frames up the collected insights into actionable opportunities
Leadership/steering committee evaluates and prioritizes insights from product manager
AI team designs solution based on prioritized insi
Solution is handed off to development and implementation team
Feedback loop: usage and impact data is collected and fed back to team for next iteration
Friction between innovation and R&D teams is typically structural, not per
Solution requires fixing the system structure, not blaming individuals
AI agent being implemented as assistant within workflow to summarize news and send daily recap emails
Agent has pre-configured instructions and tools to fetch news feeds
Workflow execution allows team to observe agent functionality in action
AI agent workflow execution allows team to observe and test agent functionality in real-time
Agent configuration includes pre-set instructions, model selection, and integrated tools for news feed fetching
Core design challenge: building an innovation and AI department from the ground up for a growing digital health company
Structural choices made now will determine if the department becomes a catalyst for breakthroughs or an expensive service bureau
Key decision: prioritize internal efficiency vs. external authority when organizing the new divi
Central question: should focus be on designing clear, function-focused internal structure that streamlines innovation lifecycle from clinical insights onward, or on external authorit
For companies relying on sophisticated platforms like Predictix, the organizational design choice is critical
